failures.description: The agent made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch invocation by passing only product_id as integer 0 instead of passing both required string arguments: item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal and plan were clear from index 1: call ProductCatalogSearch using item_id "1151293680" and product_id "1656367028". At index 2, the Researcher had all required information but produced tool_args {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and changing product_id from the provided string to an unsupported integer value. The tool then rejected this malformed payload with a SchemaError at index 3. This is not a system/connectivity issue or guardrail block.
